description_long: This is a single-story suburban house with a rectangular footprint, surrounded by a low fence and street lamps at the corners. The exterior walls are finished in a light stone or brick texture, and the roof appears flat with minimal overhang. The front facade features a main entryway with a small porch, flanked by a set of three colored bins and a garage door on one side. Windows are arranged in a mostly symmetrical pattern, with some larger panes and smaller accent windows distributed across the walls. The property is landscaped with bushes and small plants along the perimeter, and the backyard is partially visible with additional greenery. The house is situated on a paved lot, suggesting integration into an urban or suburban neighborhood.
description: A single-story suburban house with a flat roof, stone-textured exterior, garage, and landscaped perimeter, surrounded by a low fence and street lamps.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entryway, garage door, three colored bins, and symmetrical window arrangement along the stone-textured facade.
description_view_1: Side view revealing the backyard area, additional windows, and landscaping details, as well as the continuation of the low fence and street lamps.
description_view_2: Rear view highlighting the back entrance, more windows, and a clear view of the backyard landscaping and fence line.
description_view_3: Opposite side view displaying the side wall with fewer windows, the fence, and additional street lamps and plants.
attribute_window_arrangement: symmetrical rows with some larger picture windows
attribute_entryway_design: Main entryway with a small porch, single door, steps, and adjacent colored bins; minimal decorative elements.
